scenarios.name: TechVault Operational
scenarios.description: Default public APTL startup scenario backed by ACES SDL.

scenarios.name: TechVault Attacker/Target
scenarios.description: Kali red-team host plus a single monitored victim and core observability.

scenarios.name: TechVault Enterprise Web
scenarios.description: Vulnerable webapp plus database and core observability, with no SOC stack.

scenarios.name: TechVault Defensive Minimum
scenarios.description: Wazuh manager, indexer, and dashboard plus core observability, with no full SOC stack.

scenarios.name: TechVault Observability Core
scenarios.description: OTEL collector, Tempo, and Grafana only: the smallest bounded startup surface.
